title: The Noland Legend Returns
description: Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 9, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy, Nami. Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Gold!? So you do have some!?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: We wanna go to Sky Island!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: You folks seriously believe in that!?

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: Nami, No! He's a sick patient!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: What, so there's no such thing!?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: was a man of upstanding honesty.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: about the feelings of a child,
